title: Logical error: 'Storage does not support transaction. It is a bug'
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INT, value DOUBLE, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t2 (ref_id, value, description) SELECT id, CAST(id * 1.5 AS DOUBLE), NULL FROM t1;
SELECT t1.name, t2.value FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t2.description IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Transaction support in MergeTree engine is missing
